violations.finding: Three verbose mock-terminal scenario blocks (Scenario 1, 2, 3) spanning ~80 lines simulate complete terminal output with decorative emoji separators. The scenarios are highly repetitive: all three show identical pull flow with only minor variation (no changes, stashed changes, conflict). Combined with the Features section (lines 33-55) and Safety Features section (lines 141-147) which duplicate the same functionality list, this constitutes significant documentation bloat.
violations.recommendation: Remove the mock terminal output scenarios entirely or reduce to a single minimal example. Collapse the duplicated Features/Safety Features sections into one concise list. Target: ~30 lines total for this file.
